typecheck.command: echo "cc-sentiment has no typecheck baseline (no pyright/mypy config in project); skipping per services.yaml policy"

lint.command: cd client && uv run --with ruff ruff check cc_sentiment/tui tests/test_tui.py

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit exception to strict TDD-first and baseline-stop steps for features explicitly assigned to fix an existing failing/flaky baseline test. Require proof that the failure matches in-scope assignment, then allow direct fix-and-verify flow.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewed features reported process deviations tied to this pattern: deflake-generation-gpg-routes-to-remote and fix-asyncmock-warnings-in-existing-tui-tests each had handoff skillFeedback deviations despite correct, scoped fixes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove or update the stale "Known Pre-Existing Issues" note about AsyncMock RuntimeWarnings once the misc-test-hygiene warning-fix feature is accepted.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md still lists AsyncMock warnings as pre-existing while feature fix-asyncmock-warnings-in-existing-tui-tests commit aad8c97 resolves that warning source.
